servinfo.title: Whistling sound is heard from A/C evaporator

condition.ptxt: Whistling sound is heard from A/C evaporator

ps.ptxt: Depending on the combination of the interior / exterior temperatures, engine rpm and refrigerant pressure, the refrigerant flowing out of the expansion valve may generate whistling sound.

paragroup.ptxt: Slightly decreasing amount of refrigerant may stop this noise.
Inspect expansion valve and replace if faulty.
